summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Petals Atelier luxury florist website rebrand. All core functionality working perfectly with excellent design implementation.
passed_tests: Backend API testing (21/21 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Homepage with 'Artistry in Every Petal' headline and dark theme
Navigation to Collection, Weddings, Sympathy, Consultation pages
Services section with Weddings, Sympathy & Funerals, Luxury Bouquets
Collection page with premium products (£125-£195 pricing)
Categories sidebar filtering (Luxury Bouquets, Wedding Collection, etc.)
Product detail pages with add to cart functionality
Consultation form submission with success page
Mobile responsiveness with adaptive font sizes
